user.title: Connect to De-Koi
user.description: Enter the host and port where de-koi-server is running (default: localhost:8787).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to De-Koi. Verify the host and port and that de-koi-server is running.

abort.already_configured: De-Koi at this address is already configured.

init.title: De-Koi Options
init.description: Choose the primary chat and which tool categories De-Koi is allowed to use.

data_description.enabled_categories: Only the selected categories will be synced as tools into De-Koi. Changes take effect after pressing the Sync HA Tools button or restarting Home Assistant.
